login.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.error_server: The server is currently unavailable. Check the status at

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.subtitle: Please fill in your details to get started
onboarding.display_name_placeholder: E.g. Dad, Grandpa Jan, Sister Rose

status.title: Overview
status.not_linked_detail: Your account is not yet linked to a household. Please contact your administrator.
status.no_data_detail: No category status data is available yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.notif_row_sub: Email, push, SMS, WhatsApp and Telegram

monitored.button: Press here if you need help
monitored.instruction: Press the button if something is wrong. Your caregiver will be notified immediately.
monitored.sent_detail: Your caregiver has been notified and will be there as soon as possible.

reg.step1_intro: You are creating an account as a {{role}}. To activate your account, we need some additional information from you.
reg.step1_warning: Digital Lifeline is a monitoring system and is not a replacement for professional emergency services, alarm systems, or a personal alarm device. In case of emergency, always call 112.
reg.step1_checkbox: I understand that Digital Lifeline is not a replacement for an emergency system.
reg.step1_declined_notice: Your account has not been activated because you did not agree to the terms.
reg.step2_intro: This information is needed to set up your account properly. Your first and last name will not be visible to other users.
reg.step2_display_name_hint: This name is visible to other people involved. For example: "Uncle Chris", "Sister Linda" or "Homecare Team".
reg.step2_dob_hint: This field is optional and will not be shared with other users.
reg.err_dob_future: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
reg.err_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
reg.err_email_mismatch: The email addresses do not match. Please check both fields.
reg.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reg.err_code_invalid: The code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
reg.err_code_expired: This code has expired. Please request a new one.
reg.err_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please request a new code.
reg.err_phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
reg.step3_intro: Please check your details carefully. You can always update them later.
reg.step4_intro: Your email address is important. You'll receive Digital Lifeline notifications and important account information there.
reg.step4_code_hint: We sent a code to {{email}}. Also check your spam folder.
reg.step5_intro: You can choose to also receive alerts on your mobile phone, for example via SMS, WhatsApp or Telegram. This is optional, but often the fastest way to receive important notifications.
reg.step5_code_hint: We sent a verification code to {{phone}}. This confirms that you can receive notifications on this number.
reg.step6_with_phone:
Your details have been saved and your email address has been confirmed. Your mobile number has also been successfully verified.

We still need a few more steps to fully activate your account.
reg.step6_without_phone:
Your details have been saved and your email address has been confirmed.

You have chosen not to add a phone number for now. You can always add one later.

We still need a few more steps to fully activate your account.
reg.temp_text: Your account is partially set up. A few more steps are needed to complete everything.
reg.pending_text: Your registration is not yet fully complete. Complete the remaining steps to fully use Digital Lifeline.
reg.notif_intro: Choose which situations you want to be notified about and through which channel.
reg.notif_push_disabled: Add a phone number to enable push notifications.
reg.notif_sms_desc: Receive an SMS message for each notification.
reg.notif_whatsapp_desc: Receive a WhatsApp message for each notification.
reg.notif_telegram_desc: Receive a Telegram message for each notification.
reg.notif_paid_phone_hint: SMS and WhatsApp are only available after adding a phone number.
reg.notif_footer: You can always change these preferences later in Settings & notifications.
reg.notif_level_minor_desc: For small changes that may need attention, but are not immediately concerning.
reg.notif_level_warning_desc: For clear deviations where a family member or caregiver should probably check in.
reg.notif_level_emergency_desc: For notifications that need to be seen quickly, for example when someone indicates they need help.
reg.privacy_intro: The administrator created your account based on your name and email address. Below you can read how your personal data is stored and who can view it.
reg.privacy_body: The information you entered in the previous steps is stored via a secure connection in the secure portal. Normally, the administrator can view this information to support you as best as possible. With the option below, you can choose to shield your personal data — the administrator will then only see your name and email address.
reg.privacy_name_note: Your name and email address are always visible to the administrator, as they were used when creating your account.
reg.privacy_toggle_label: Shield my data from the administrator
reg.privacy_toggle_sub: The administrator will only be able to see your name and email address.
reg.privacy_shield_active: Your personal data is shielded. The administrator can only see your name and email address.

welcome.title: Welcome to Digital Lifeline!
welcome.setup_done: The most important settings have been configured.
welcome.more_settings: More options are available in Settings to further customize Digital Lifeline to your preferences.
welcome.our_effort: We've done our best to build this system as well as possible.
welcome.share: Happy with it? Share it with the world — it means a lot to us.
welcome.help_text: For help, you can always visit

phone_verify.sent_hint: We sent an SMS code to {{phone}}. Enter it below.
phone_verify.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
phone_verify.error_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
